metadata.description: Amit Tabibi's Claude Code skills — a growing collection, each plugin installable on its own.

plugins.name: session-skills
plugins.description: Two complementary skills for ending a Claude Code session cleanly: session-handoff (in-chat handoff for a fresh context) and session-save (persist decisions into your project's own files).

plugins.name: fable-prompt
plugins.description: Turns a rough ask into a finished, lean prompt optimized for Claude Fable 5 / Mythos 5, distilled from Anthropic's official Fable 5 prompting guide.
